title: مرسوم بقانون رقم (11) لسنة 1978 بإنشاء وتنظيم الكلية الجامعية للعلوم والآداب والتربية
title_en: Legislative Law No. (20) of 1977 Amending Certain Provisions of the Law Regulating Pensions and Retirement Gratuities for Officers and Personnel of the Bahrain Defence Force and Public Security, promulgated by Legislative Decree No. (11) of 1976
